- URL: https://birat.codes/blog/model-context-protocol-mcp-intro
- Published: 2026-04-15
- Updated: 2026-04-16
- Author: Birat Gautam
- Tags: Agentic AI, MCP, AI Systems

Exploring the Model Context Protocol (MCP) — the new standard for connecting AI models to external tools, data, and environments.
